summary.shape_sentence: Bearish stair-step trend day: early flush, brief squeeze and midday balance, then renewed afternoon liquidation into a near-low close.

goat.note: Failed lunch rebound rolled over beneath supply and became the cleanest downside continuation leg.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered on lower highs and failed retracements into the red ribbon; bearish pivots repeatedly resolved lower.

green_circles.behavior: Mostly marked short-lived countertrend bounces and temporary demand defenses, not durable reversal structure.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply zones around 23,740-23,800, then lower around 23,680-23,720 and 23,500-23,560, were mostly respected from below after brief tests.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand zones stepped down through the session and were broken in sequence, with only brief holds before continuation lower.

time_markers.10am_blue: High-volatility whipsaw into the main squeeze high, followed by quick failure back into bearish structure.
time_markers.12pm_red: Lunch rebound was stalling under resistance rather than reclaiming trend control.
time_markers.2pm_green: Market was back in clear lower-high continuation mode with shallow pauses only.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near session lows with no meaningful late rebound.

takeaway: Bearish continuation trend day with an early squeeze trap, failed lunch rebound, and orderly afternoon support breakdowns.
